lines.speaker: Hervi
lines.text: Greetings, human... can I interest you in some fine gems?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Show me the wares!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Hervi
lines.text: Hello! I've got a little quest for you, are you interested?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I love quests!

lines.speaker: Hervi
lines.text: That's the spirit! Now, what I need is [X] [item]. And I need them within [X]] minutes as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not much of a quest, but I'll do it. Just [X] [item] in [X] minutes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, quests are dull and boring.

lines.speaker: Hervi
lines.text: Don't be so dismissive, you didn't even hear what I wanted to ask you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't want to! I just want to kill things!

sections.title: Talking to him before acquiring the item request

lines.speaker: Hervi
lines.text: Are my [X] [item] arriving anytime soon?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not anytime soon. Or at all. I've given up on looking for them.

lines.speaker: Hervi
lines.text: Couldn't you decide that in advance? You're certainly lacking in manners!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Soon, yes, I hope so.

lines.speaker: Hervi
lines.text: Good, soon can't be soon enough for me!

sections.title: Talking to him after failing to bring the request in time

lines.speaker: Hervi
lines.text: Time's up! And I don't have my [X] [item]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're right, I'm sorry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good news, I got you [X] [item]!

lines.speaker: Hervi
lines.text: And not a minute too late! Great!

lines.speaker: Hervi
lines.text: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you prefer me to teach you a bit about how you can mine more efficiently?

lines.speaker: Hervi
lines.text: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you like me to show you some smithing tricks?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like the gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please teach me that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Show me the gold!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Enlighten me.

sections.title: Catching the player trying to steal from his gem stall

lines.speaker: Hervi
lines.text: Hands off those gems!

sections.title: Interacting with him after stealing from his gem stall recently

lines.speaker: Hervi
lines.text: You're the thief! Stop!

lines.speaker: Hervi
lines.text: Guards, get this filthy human!
